stemHtml: Without an ATC clearance, what are the minimum weather conditions required for VFR flights departing from or arriving at an aerodrome inside a control zone?

options.a: Ceiling 1000 ft and ground visibility 1.5 km.
options.b: Ceiling 1500 ft and ground visibility 5 km.
options.c: Ceiling 1000 ft and ground visibility 10 km.
options.d: Ceiling 1500 ft and ground visibility 8 km.
